Hellas S&P Weekly Bulletin 10 September 2021
NEW BUILDING
In tankers, Chengxi announced contracting one firm plus one optional 37k dwt Asphalt and Bitumen tanker for Vitol Group, with delivery of the firm
vessel set to take place within 2023. Chongqing Chandong announced taking order for a firm 8k dwt Chemical tanker from China Shipping Chemi
